title: celtis biondii var. heterophylla
intro: Celtis biondii var. heterophylla, also known as Jujube or Chinese Jujube, is a plant species that belongs to the Ulmaceae family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Celtis biondii var. heterophylla include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the bark, leaves, and fruits of the plant are used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
